hero_subtitle: SFTY Business integrates multiple blockchain analytics providers into one seamless KYT transaction monitoring workflow to enhance wallet risk aggregation and streamline case management.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Provider outputs remain disconnected in workflows
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to correlate blockchain analytics data with wallet activity and transaction risk across multiple systems. This fragmentation creates delays, complicates source-of-funds reviews, and weakens audit readiness in transaction monitoring workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates blockchain analytics outputs, wallet activity, transaction risk and sanctions data into a unified workflow that structures reviews, supports case creation and preserves audit-ready evidence.
workflow_title: From wallet risk signals to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates blockchain analytics outputs to link wallet risk, transactions and alerts into structured cases with preserved evidence for compliance review.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond wallet alerts. One risk review layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY consolidates blockchain analytics outputs into structured workflows, linking wallet risk, transactions, cases, decisions and evidence for clearer KYT transaction monitoring control.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports regulated VASPs by connecting blockchain analytics, preserving audit evidence and enabling bank due diligence within scalable, controlled enterprise deployments.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for KYT compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a connected compliance layer that connects wallet risk, transaction monitoring and provider outputs into structured workflows for VASP compliance teams.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY integrate blockchain analytics?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates blockchain analytics outputs into transaction risk workflows, linking wallet activity, source and destination of funds to alerts and cases for streamlined review.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history and supporting evidence, enabling compliance teams to maintain a clear audit trail for transaction monitoring and wallet risk reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY connect multiple KYT providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY orchestrates multiple KYT providers by combining their risk signals and screening results into a single compliance workflow for efficient case management.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing KYT providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above KYT and blockchain analytics providers, turning their outputs into structured compliance workflows without replacing the underlying providers.
final_title: Bring blockchain analytics into KYT workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY integrates wallet risk and transaction data into structured cases, alerts and audit-ready evidence for VASP compliance teams.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
